since_last: 41% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.31%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -1.36% · Gold +1.26% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 41% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.31%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.31%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +13.14%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +13.14%, DELL +2.19%, OKLO +2.13%, CCJ +2.12%, HPE +1.56%. Laggards: SKHY -6.55%, GEV -4.78%, MGNI -4.29%, LRCX -4.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.19% at $123.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
